messages.blurry: Text is not sharp enough to read. Move closer to the label, hold the camera flat and square, tap the screen to focus, and pause briefly before taking the photo.
messages.too_dark: Label is too dark to read. Turn on your flash, hold the camera straight to the label, and avoid steep angles that can deepen shadows.
messages.glare: Flash reflection is covering part of the label. Slightly shift your position to remove the glare, then retake straight-on.
messages.low_text_legibility: Label appears faded or damaged. Move in close, hold the camera flat to the label, and capture it as clearly as possible.
messages.qr_code: Capture the full data label with the serial and model numbers visible — not the QR code.
messages.obstructed: Something is blocking the label. Clear the obstruction, center the label in the frame, and shoot straight-on.
